info.title: DEML Public Ingestion & Inference API
info.description:
Data Engineering for AI Engineering and Cybersecurity (DEML) public integration endpoints.

**Sandbox Demo Key**: For public demonstration and sandbox testing, authorize using the token `deml_swagger_api_key` (Bearer authentication in the top-right 'Authorize' button). This maps requests to a scoped, unprivileged demo operator user.

post.description: Normalize CrowdStrike/SentinelOne-style alerts into the SOC pipeline.

post.summary: LLM Inference with Prompt Injection Detection
